global_description: A small, compact waterbird with a rounded body and a distinctive head shape. It features striking red eyes and a contrasting black and white plumage. The head is adorned with golden tufts resembling horns, and the body is covered in smooth, water-repellent feathers.

part_details.head: Rounded with prominent golden tufts extending backwards, contrasting with the black crown.
part_details.eyes: Bright red, small, and round, set against the dark feathers of the face.
part_details.plumage: Black on the upper parts and white on the underparts, with a smooth texture.
part_details.body: Compact and rounded, covered in sleek, water-repellent feathers.

spatial_relations: The golden tufts extend backwards from the sides of the head.
The red eyes are positioned centrally on the face.
The black plumage covers the upper body, while the white feathers cover the underparts.
